mutation_policy: Version-1 environment, configuration, freeze attestation, and operational inputs are immutable. Obligations below apply to a future superseding freeze package only.

b4_environment_freeze_location_requireme.statement: The bound environment requires that exact repository revision, dependency-file digest, platform details, and the environment artifact digest be recorded in the frozen manifest or freeze attestation.
observed_version_1_gaps: Dependency lockfile raw-byte digest is not fully recorded in the frozen manifest or freeze attestation.
Concrete platform details for the frozen execution environment are incomplete in the freeze location.
Exact canonical freeze-integration revision is not fully bound as a single authoritative freeze revision field in the freeze location.

required_version_2_fields_in_manifest_or.requirement: Exact freeze-integration commit SHA containing every bound frozen input byte.
Record algorithm, value, and RAW_FILE_BYTES scope at freeze; recompute at freeze time.
Record OS family, architecture, and CPython version intended for execution reproducibility, or an explicit offline human-adjudication platform declaration consistent with the environment artifact.
Continue to bind the exact environment JSON raw-byte digest already required by the contract.

forbidden_repairs: Retroactively editing the version-1 freeze attestation or manifest to insert missing fields.
Treating a later live intake host record as a substitute for freeze-time environment identity when the environment requires freeze-location recording.

b5_attestation_inventory_and_lifecycle.statement: The package README historically described the freeze attestation as containing an artifact inventory and raw-byte digests. The version-1 attestation records study identity, authority, timestamps, counts, output absence, and claim boundaries, while per-artifact digests live in the canonical manifest. Several bound operational inputs still self-declare DRAFT_FREEZE_INTENT lifecycle wording.

must_include: role (protocol, profile, rules, environment, configuration, case-source metadata binding, subject definition, etc.)
version_2_attestation_inventory_obligati.consistency_rule: Attestation inventory digests must equal the corresponding immutable digests in the superseding canonical manifest.

lifecycle_label_resolution.problem: Operational inputs bound by the frozen v1 manifest still self-declare artifact_status DRAFT_FREEZE_INTENT while the external freeze made their bytes immutable.
version_2_resolution_options: Superseding operational copies that self-declare FROZEN_OPERATIONAL_INPUT and are digest-bound by the v2 manifest and attestation inventory.
Explicit freeze attestation language that the external freeze supersedes local DRAFT_FREEZE_INTENT wording for named digests, without rewriting those v1 files.
lifecycle_label_resolution.selected_default_for_later_freeze_packag: Prefer superseding operational copies with explicit FROZEN_OPERATIONAL_INPUT status so local and external lifecycle language agree.
lifecycle_label_resolution.forbidden: Editing version-1 definitions or reproducibility files in place to flip lifecycle labels.

claim_boundary: These obligations do not freeze a study, register a record, or authorize execution.
Dependency and platform values recorded at package authoring are provisional snapshots for disclosure only; freeze must recompute.
No planned outputs are created by defining freeze inventory requirements.
